home.demoDescription: A fully decentralized battleships game running on the Calimero P2P network. Private ship placements, verifiable shots, real-time state sync between players — no central server.
home.calimeroIntro: Built on Calimero's privacy-first P2P infrastructure. Each match runs in its own isolated context with cryptographic identity and private storage.

description.title: Naval Command
description.subtitle: Decentralized Naval Warfare
features: Private ship placement — opponents never see your board
Real-time P2P state sync between nodes
